ExtensionMethodsHandleGetBySqlStatement Method (IMethod, FuncIRequest, IReadOnlyListSqlStatementRun, SqlStatementType)

One Identity Manager API Server
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static ISqlStatementMethod HandleGetBySqlStatement(
	this IMethod method,
	Func<IRequest, IReadOnlyList<SqlStatementRun>> runs,
	SqlStatementType statementType
)

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIMethod
Base method.
runs
Type: SystemFuncIRequest, IReadOnlyListSqlStatementRun
Calculation function that returns the names of pre-defined SQL statement runs. Each run can have its own statement name and its own parameter values.
statementType
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionSqlStatementType
Type of SQL statement.

Return Value

Type: ISqlStatementMethod

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethod. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
Remarks
If you are running more than one statement, the result schemas of each statement must be identical.
See Also
